meta.title: Primigi App for iPhone & Mac — Program LED Shoes | primigi.dev
meta.description: The Primigi Lights App is Android-only. Our web app works on iPhone, iPad, Mac and Windows. Program the LED scrolling text on Primigi Infinity Light shoes — right in your browser.
meta.ogTitle: Primigi App for iPhone & Mac — Program LED Infinity Light Shoes
meta.ogDescription: Web app to program the LED scrolling text on Primigi Infinity Light kids' shoes. The Primigi Lights App is Android-only — our alternative works on iPhone, iPad, Mac and Windows.

iphone.title: iPhone / iPad Users
iphone.desc: Safari doesn't support Bluetooth. Download the free Bluefy app once and open primigi.dev inside it.

hero.tagline: The app Primigi forgot to make

cta.subtext: One-time payment. No subscription. Works in the browser on all devices.
cta.payment: Payment via Stripe. Available immediately after purchase.

steps.title: How it works
steps.s1desc: Press the red button under the heel tab until the LEDs light up.
steps.s2desc: Go to primigi.dev in your browser — on phone, tablet or computer.
steps.s3desc: Click "Connect". The shoe appears as "PRIMIGI LED".
steps.s4desc: Type your message, send it — and be amazed.

models.title: Compatible Models
models.subtitle: All Primigi Infinity Light models with programmable LED display

features.title: Why this app?
features.subtitle: The original Primigi Lights App is Android-only — and hard to find. Our solution works everywhere.
features.f1desc: Works on iPhone, iPad, Mac, Windows — anywhere a modern browser with Bluetooth runs.
features.f2desc: Web app in the browser. No App Store, no Play Store, no download.
features.f3desc: We analysed the Bluetooth protocol and built our own, better app.
features.f4desc: One-time payment of €3, no subscription. Instant access. Works forever.
features.f5desc: Type text, press send. No technical knowledge required.
features.f6desc: Fully in English. Step-by-step instructions included. Email support available.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Does the Primigi app work on iPhone?
faq.a1: Yes — but Safari doesn't support Web Bluetooth. For iPhone and iPad, simply download the free app "Bluefy – Web BLE Browser" from the App Store, open primigi.dev inside it, and everything works.
faq.q2: How do I connect the shoes to the app?
faq.a2: Turn on the shoe (red button under the heel tab), open the app in your browser and click "Connect". The shoe appears as "PRIMIGI LED".
faq.q3: What text can I write on the shoes?
faq.a3: Any text with letters, numbers and special characters. The text scrolls as an LED marquee across the display on the velcro strap.
faq.q4: Do I need to install the app?
faq.a4: No! Our app runs directly in the browser via Web Bluetooth. No App Store, no download, no installation.
faq.q5: Does it work without an Android device?
faq.a5: Yes! That's exactly what this app was built for. Mac, Windows PC, iPhone (with Bluefy), iPad, Android.
faq.q6: How do I charge the LED shoes?
faq.a6: The shoes are charged via the included USB cable. A full charge lasts approximately 4–6 hours.
faq.a7: All Primigi models in the 'Infinity Light' range — recognisable by the LED display on the velcro strap and the red button under the heel tab.
faq.q8: Where can I find the Primigi Lights App download?
faq.a8: The original app is barely findable in the Play Store. Our web app at primigi.dev is the reliable alternative.
faq.q9: How do Primigi Infinity Light shoes fit?
faq.a9: Normal to slightly small — order half a size up. Sizes EU 24–39.

seo.h1: Program Primigi Infinity Light shoes — the Primigi Lights App alternative
seo.p1: The Primigi Infinity Light collection delights children with its programmable LED scrolling display. The official "Primigi Lights" app is Android-only and barely findable in the Play Store. Anyone using iPhone, iPad or Mac has been left without a solution — until now.
seo.p2: We had the same problem and decided to build the app ourselves. By reverse engineering the Bluetooth protocol, we created a web app that runs in the browser — whether you use iPhone (with Bluefy), Mac or Windows.
seo.h2: Primigi App for iPhone and Mac
seo.p3: On Mac, our app works directly in Chrome or Edge. On iPhone, download the free "Bluefy" app from the App Store once and open primigi.dev inside it.
seo.h3: Primigi Infinity Light App for Windows
seo.p4: Chrome and Edge fully support Web Bluetooth. If your PC has Bluetooth, you can program the shoes directly from your computer.
seo.h4: What is the Primigi Lights App?
seo.p5: Primigi released the "Primigi Lights" app for Android — in the Play Store it has practically disappeared. It never existed for iPhones. primigi.dev fills that gap.
seo.p6: On the velcro strap sits an LED matrix display. Press the red button, the shoe lights up. The USB port only charges the battery — data goes exclusively via Bluetooth.
seo.h6: LED shoes for kids — compatible models
seo.p7: PIL 2959x (boys), PIL 2969x (girls), PIL 2961x (High-Top), PIL 2963x (Velcro Low). Sizes EU 24–39. Available at Amazon, Spartoo and the Primigi online shop.
seo.p8: On the smaller side. Order half a size up. Battery lasts 4–6 hours, charged via USB cable.
